meaning: n.[律]用益权,使用权,行使用益权vt.根据用益权占有
examples: Both the urban house ownership and public domain usufruct should be legally protected.
The usufruct of land and buildings' ownership is one of hot topics in law science of real estate.
The property rights power has four items: Holds the power, the right of use, the usufruct and the disposition right.
